function solve(n) {
    let sum = 0;
    let product = 1;
    let strN = n.toString();
    for (let i = 0; i < strN.length; i++) {
        let digit = parseInt(strN[i]);
        sum += digit;
        product *= digit;
    }
    let total = sum + product;
    return n % total === 0;
}
